perturbation.original_text: 1.1 Appointment of Service Provider. (a) Owner hereby appoints Service Provider, and Service Provider hereby accepts the appointment, to perform the SEF operations and maintenance services ("Services") on behalf of Owner as of the Services Commencement Date as further described in Exhibit C hereto in accordance with and subject to the terms and conditions set forth in this Agreement. (b) Except as otherwise expressly provided in this Agreement, Service Provider shall perform the Services and its obligations under this Agreement, and act at all times as an independent Service Provider of Owner. None of Service Provider's employees shall be, or shall be considered to be, employees of Owner.
perturbation.changed_text: 1.1 Appointment of Service Provider. (a) Owner hereby appoints Service Provider, and Service Provider hereby accepts the appointment, to perform the SEF operations and maintenance services ("Services") on behalf of Owner as of the Services Commencement Date as further described in Exhibit C hereto in accordance with and subject to the terms and conditions set forth in this Agreement. (b) Except as otherwise expressly provided in this Agreement, Contractor shall perform the Services and its obligations under this Agreement, and act at all times as an independent Service Provider of Owner. None of Service Provider's employees shall be, or shall be considered to be, employees of Owner.
perturbation.explanation: The term 'Service Provider' is changed to 'Contractor' in section 1.1(b). This introduces a contradiction because the agreement consistently refers to the entity performing the services as 'Service Provider' except in this altered instance. This creates ambiguity about whether 'Contractor' and 'Service Provider' refer to the same entity.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 1.1 Appointment of Service Provider. (a) Owner hereby appoints Service Provider, and Service Provider hereby accepts the appointment, to perform the SEF operations and maintenance services ("Services") on behalf of Owner as of the Services Commencement Date as further described in Exhibit C hereto in accordance with and subject to the terms and conditions set forth in this Agreement. (b) Except as otherwise expressly provided in this Agreement, Contractor shall perform the Services and its obligations under this Agreement, and act at all times as an independent Service Provider of Owner. None of Service Provider's employees shall be, or shall be considered to be, employees of Owner.
perturbation.justification: The changed text replaces 'Service Provider' with 'Contractor' in section 1.1(b), while the contradicted text (which is also section 1.1) uses both terms. This creates ambiguity regarding whether 'Contractor' and 'Service Provider' refer to the same entity, leading to a misalignment of terminology and thus an in-text contradiction as defined in the instructions. The inconsistency in terminology directly impacts the obligations and understanding of the agreement, making enforcement uncertain.

perturbation.original_text: 1.2 Performance of Maintenance Services. Service Provider shall perform the maintenance portion of the Services in a clean, safe, efficient and environmentally reasonable manner and maintain the SEF in good operating and mechanical condition in accordance with this Agreement and (i) all applicable laws and permits, (ii) all applicable express warranties and guarantees provided by manufacturers, suppliers, or Service Providers who provided materials or labor under the Engineering, Procurement and Construction Agreement dated September 30, 2009 (the "EPC Agreement") for the SEF subject to the terms and limitations thereof, and (iii) all manufacturer's maintenance instructions and specifications.
perturbation.changed_text: 1.2 Performance of Maintenance Services. The O&M company shall perform the maintenance portion of the Services in a clean, safe, efficient and environmentally reasonable manner and maintain the SEF in good operating and mechanical condition in accordance with this Agreement and (i) all applicable laws and permits, (ii) all applicable express warranties and guarantees provided by manufacturers, suppliers, or Service Providers who provided materials or labor under the Engineering, Procurement and Construction Agreement dated September 30, 2009 (the "EPC Agreement") for the SEF subject to the terms and limitations thereof, and (iii) all manufacturer's maintenance instructions and specifications.
perturbation.explanation: The term 'Service Provider' is replaced with 'The O&M company'. While 'Service Provider' is explicitly defined, 'The O&M company' is not, raising the uncertainty of whether 'The O&M company' has the same rights and responsibilities, causing an in-text contradiction in the section where 'Service Provider' is originally defined.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 1.1 Appointment of Service Provider. (a) Owner hereby appoints Service Provider, and Service Provider hereby accepts the appointment, to perform the SEF operations and maintenance services ("Services") on behalf of Owner as of the Services Commencement Date as further described in Exhibit C hereto in accordance with and subject to the terms and conditions set forth in this Agreement. (b) Except as otherwise expressly provided in this Agreement, Service Provider shall perform the Services and its obligations under this Agreement, and act at all times as an independent Service Provider of Owner. None of Service Provider's employees shall be, or shall be considered to be, employees of Owner.
perturbation.justification: The original text refers to 'Service Provider,' which is explicitly defined in Section 1.1 as the entity appointed by the owner to perform operations and maintenance services. By changing 'Service Provider' to 'The O&M company' in Section 1.2, the modified text introduces ambiguity because 'The O&M company' is not explicitly defined, creating uncertainty about whether it holds the same rights and responsibilities as the defined 'Service Provider'. This directly contradicts Section 1.1, which clearly specifies the role and appointment of 'Service Provider,' causing a strong in-text contradiction due to misaligned terminology, as per the provided definition.

perturbation.original_text: 1.3 Performance Objectives. Service Provider shall perform the Services and its obligations under this Agreement in a manner that (a) insures the operation of the SEF within all required operational parameters and requirements, (b) preserves all warranties provided by manufacturers, suppliers, or Service Providers who provided materials or labor under the EPC Agreement relating to the SEF, subject to Force Majeure, (c) maintains the SEF, and 1 (d) seeks to minimize the variable operating costs of and wear and tear on the SEF, including using commercially reasonable efforts to achieve industry standard levels of SEF availability.
perturbation.changed_text: 1.3 Performance Objectives. The vendor shall perform the Services and its obligations under this Agreement in a manner that (a) insures the operation of the SEF within all required operational parameters and requirements, (b) preserves all warranties provided by manufacturers, suppliers, or Service Providers who provided materials or labor under the EPC Agreement relating to the SEF, subject to Force Majeure, (c) maintains the SEF, and 1 (d) seeks to minimize the variable operating costs of and wear and tear on the SEF, including using commercially reasonable efforts to achieve industry standard levels of SEF availability.
perturbation.explanation: The term 'Service Provider' is replaced with 'The vendor.' While 'Service Provider' is explicitly defined as 'Solar Power, Inc.', 'The vendor' is not, raising the uncertainty of whether 'The vendor' has the same rights and responsibilities as 'Service Provider', causing an in-text contradiction in the section where 'Service Provider' is originally defined.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 1.1 Appointment of Service Provider. (a) Owner hereby appoints Service Provider, and Service Provider hereby accepts the appointment, to perform the SEF operations and maintenance services ("Services") on behalf of Owner as of the Services Commencement Date as further described in Exhibit C hereto in accordance with and subject to the terms and conditions set forth in this Agreement. (b) Except as otherwise expressly provided in this Agreement, Service Provider shall perform the Services and its obligations under this Agreement, and act at all times as an independent Service Provider of Owner. None of Service Provider's employees shall be, or shall be considered to be, employees of Owner.
perturbation.justification: The original text uses 'Service Provider,' which is explicitly defined as 'Solar Power, Inc.' The changed text replaces this with 'The vendor,' which is not defined. The contradicted text defines the role and responsibilities specifically for 'Service Provider' appointed by the Owner. By changing 'Service Provider' to 'The vendor' in the changed text, it creates uncertainty as to whether 'The vendor' has the same appointment, rights, and obligations as 'Service Provider' outlined in the contradicted text, thus creating a strong in-text contradiction. This aligns with the 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction' definition as the contract uses multiple terms interchangeably without defining them, leading to conflicting obligations.
